intro: Serrafalcus × ferronii is a rare and hybrid species of plant, resulting from the cross between Serrafalcus rostratus and Ferula foetida, both belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, contributing to its potential in alleviating pain, reducing inflammation, and protecting against oxidative stress.
